narrative:
Beavercreek 036 (precinct in Greene County) has 1,038 registered voters, with 46.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 39.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 26.4 percentage points.
